---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What do you want?

A clear one-paragraph description. What would the dashboard let you do that it doesn't today?

## Why?

What's the underlying problem or workflow gap? Help me understand the *job to be done* — not just the solution you're imagining.

## How do you imagine it working?

Sketch the user-facing behavior. UI mockups or before/after stories are great. Don't worry about implementation.

## Alternatives you considered

What else could solve this? Why is this the best path?

## Scope

Pick one:

- [ ] **Small** — a config flag, a new env var, a docs addition (couple hours)
- [ ] **Medium** — a new endpoint, a new coder backend field, a UI component (a day)
- [ ] **Large** — a new stage in the ticket lifecycle, a new platform, a new integration (multi-day, needs design discussion)

## Are you willing to do the work?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just filing for visibility

## Anything else?

Links to similar features in other tools, prior discussion, related issues.
